use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF DUCHENNE MUSCULAR DYSTROPHY (DMD) IN PATIENTS WHO HAVE A CONFIRMED MUTATION OF THE DMD GENE THAT IS AMENABLE TO EXON 53 SKIPPING

indications.text:
VILTEPSO is indicated for the treatment of Duchenne muscular dystrophy (DMD) in patients who
have a confirmed mutation of the DMD gene that is amenable to exon 53 skipping. This indication is
approved under accelerated approval based on an increase in dystrophin production in skeletal
muscle observe...
